MetricExplainSpec.description: Optional configuration for exporting row-level metric evidence.

from.description: Optional driving table expression used to build the evidence rowset.
from.title: From

where.description: Optional extra rowset predicates appended after compiled calculate filters.
where.title: Where

grain.description: Evidence grain column reference (string) or a mapping of labels to column references.
grain.title: Grain

define.description: Optional DEFINE blocks scoped to explain queries only. Accepts the same shapes as visual context `define` (string, mapping, or mixed sequences).
define.title: Define

select.description: Mapping of evidence column labels to DAX expressions evaluated per row.
select.title: Select

MetricExplainSpec.title: MetricExplainSpec

description: Schema-backed document model for reusable metric components.

schema.description: Schema identifier for the metric component document.
schema.title: Schema

explain.description: Explain-plan fragment merged into composed metrics.

title: MetricComponentDocument
